title: Improve database security using Multi-Tenant JWT
description: Improve database security using Multi-Tenant JWT.\n\nSee docs/MT_ADMIN_AMENDMENT_SUMMARY.md for recent amendments and context.

title: Create app-to-client mapping configuration
description: Create src/api/config/app-client-mapping.ts to map app codes to client UUIDs as per docs/MULTITENANT_JWT_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md.\n\nRef: docs/MT_ADMIN_AMENDMENT_SUMMARY.md

title: Implement client-specific role lookup
description: Update fetchUserRoleData to accept a clientId parameter and filter roles by it. Add fallback logic.\n\nRef: docs/MT_ADMIN_AMENDMENT_SUMMARY.md

title: Update token generation to use client context
description: Update generateSupabaseTokenForUser and AuthApiClient to pass the client context during sign-in and token refresh.\n\nRef: docs/MT_ADMIN_AMENDMENT_SUMMARY.md

title: Support multiple organization memberships per docs/orgs
description: Implement multiple org membership support as defined in docs/orgs/ORG_MEMBERSHIP_DETECTION_SUMMARY.md. Note: The documentation references files that may be missing from this repo (see docs/MULTITENANT_JWT_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md findings).

title: Implement src/api/utils/org-membership.ts
description: Create the helper functions for Auth0 and WorkOS org membership detection as specified in org-membership.ts code provided in .
